product: self-improve — a Claude Code plugin that runs a continuous, autonomous, self-improving engineering loop on any repo.
primaryGoal: Let a product owner improve their solution unattended for hours while staying in full control of what ships to main.
outOfBounds: Do not push or merge to main (human-gated)
Do not change the model identifier or add it to any committed artifact
Do not rename the public command set without an explicit decision (see SI-011)
notes: No app UI to exercise; the QA gate is structural validation (manifests + command/agent frontmatter + generated state). E2E/visual scaffolding (SI-009) is N/A for this repo but applies when the plugin runs on UI products.
